description: Damaged rack upright — bent, dented, or deformed vertical column compromising structural capacity
visual_signals: bent or bowed vertical rack column with visible deformation
dented rack upright with paint chipped exposing bare metal
buckled rack frame member showing lateral displacement

description: Missing beam locks — beam-to-upright safety clips absent, allowing beams to dislodge under impact
visual_signals: beam end connection to upright without safety clip or pin
empty clip holes at beam-to-column joint
beam resting in slot without locking mechanism visible

description: Overloaded rack bay — visible sagging of beams or pallets exceeding posted load capacity
visual_signals: rack beam sagging under excessive pallet weight
multiple heavy pallets on shelf beyond rated count
bowed beam with visible deflection at center span

description: Missing load capacity signage — rack system lacking posted maximum load per level and total bay capacity
visual_signals: rack bay end without capacity placard or load sign
row of racking with no visible load rating label
rack system missing engineering capacity chart at aisle end

description: Missing column protectors — rack uprights at aisle ends without bollards or guards to absorb forklift impact
visual_signals: rack upright at aisle end with no bollard or guard installed
exposed rack column base in forklift travel lane
end-of-aisle rack frame without protective post or deflector

description: Pallet overhanging rack edge — pallet or load extending beyond beam face creating strike or fall hazard
visual_signals: pallet edge protruding past rack beam into aisle space
load extending over rack beam face by several inches
product box overhanging pallet and rack edge into walkway

description: Forklift traveling with raised forks — forks elevated above 4 inches while moving, reducing stability and visibility
visual_signals: forklift driving with forks raised high above floor level
moving forklift with elevated empty forks blocking driver sight line
powered truck traveling through aisle with forks not lowered

description: Unsecured forklift load — load not tilted back or too tall/wide, at risk of sliding or falling during transport
visual_signals: forklift carrying load tilted forward and visibly unstable
pallet load leaning to one side on forklift forks
oversized load on forks obstructing operator forward vision

description: Pedestrian in forklift zone — worker on foot inside designated forklift travel lane without separation or escort
visual_signals: person walking in same aisle as operating forklift
pedestrian in marked forklift lane with no physical barrier
worker on foot near blind corner where forklifts travel

description: Forklift missing overhead guard — operator compartment lacks overhead protection against falling objects
visual_signals: forklift operator sitting under open frame with no overhead cage
powered truck missing overhead guard structure above seat
forklift with damaged or removed canopy guard

description: Forklift missing warning light — blue spot or strobe light absent, reducing pedestrian awareness of approaching truck
visual_signals: forklift operating without blue spot floor warning light
powered truck with no strobe or beacon light on overhead guard
forklift approaching intersection with no audible or visual warning

description: Dock door open without trailer — overhead door raised with no trailer sealed to the dock, creating fall hazard
visual_signals: open dock bay door showing daylight with no trailer present
raised overhead door revealing empty dock well and ground below
dock opening without trailer or safety barrier across bay

description: Missing dock plate — gap between trailer bed and dock floor without bridge plate, creating trip/fall risk
visual_signals: visible gap between dock edge and trailer bed with no plate
forklift approaching dock-trailer transition without bridge plate
dock opening with trailer backed in but no leveler or plate deployed

description: Trailer not chocked — docked trailer without wheel chocks in place, risking trailer creep during loading
visual_signals: trailer wheels at dock with no chock blocks visible
backed-in trailer tires on ground without chocking
dock bay in use with wheel chocks hanging unused on wall

description: Dock edge without safety striping — dock perimeter lacking yellow/black hazard markings to warn of drop-off
visual_signals: dock edge floor with faded or missing yellow hazard striping
dock perimeter without contrasting safety paint markings
unmarked dock edge where floor meets drop-off to bay

description: Fire extinguisher missing — required extinguisher absent from mounting location or not visible in designated area
visual_signals: empty wall bracket where fire extinguisher should be mounted
fire extinguisher sign on wall with no unit present
bare mounting hook in warehouse area designated for extinguisher

description: Blocked fire exit — emergency exit door obstructed by pallets, inventory, equipment, or debris
visual_signals: pallets stacked in front of emergency exit door
inventory blocking clear path to fire exit
exit door with equipment staged directly against it preventing opening

description: Obstructed sprinkler heads — storage stacked within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors violating NFPA 13 clearance
visual_signals: inventory stacked close to ceiling touching or near sprinkler heads
pallet top within inches of sprinkler deflector plate
boxes on top rack level encroaching on 18-inch sprinkler clearance

description: Missing exit sign — emergency exit lacking illuminated or photoluminescent exit signage
visual_signals: emergency door with no illuminated exit sign above it
dark or unlit exit sign above emergency egress door
exit pathway without visible directional exit signage

description: Aisle obstruction — travel aisle partially or fully blocked by pallets, equipment, trash, or staged goods
visual_signals: warehouse aisle partially blocked by pallets placed on floor
forklift travel lane narrowed by staged goods encroaching into aisle
aisle fully blocked by equipment preventing through passage

description: Faded floor markings — pedestrian lanes, forklift paths, or staging zones with worn or missing paint lines
visual_signals: barely visible yellow floor line in warehouse aisle
worn pedestrian lane marking with gaps in paint
staging zone boundary line faded beyond recognition

description: Floor spill — liquid, oil, or granular material on floor creating slip hazard without cleanup or warning signs
visual_signals: liquid puddle on warehouse floor without wet floor sign
oil slick on concrete near equipment with no absorbent applied
granular material spilled across walkway without cleanup

description: Tripping hazard — hoses, cables, shrink wrap, strapping, or small debris in walking or driving paths
visual_signals: electrical cable or air hose stretched across warehouse aisle
loose shrink wrap and strapping bands on floor in travel path
small debris and packing material scattered in walkway

description: Worker without hard hat — employee in rack loading zone or under elevated work without head protection
visual_signals: person under racking without hard hat while forklift loads above
worker in overhead hazard zone with bare head
employee near elevated stock operations lacking head protection

description: Worker without safety vest — employee in forklift traffic area lacking high-visibility garment
visual_signals: person in dark clothing in active forklift zone
worker without reflective vest walking in equipment area
employee in forklift traffic aisle lacking hi-vis garment

description: Blocked electrical panel — switchgear or breaker panel obstructed within 36-inch clearance zone (OSHA 1910.303)
visual_signals: boxes or inventory stacked in front of electrical panel
equipment placed within 36 inches of breaker box
electrical panel access blocked by stored materials

description: Missing SDS or chemical label — hazardous material container without safety data sheet access or proper labeling
visual_signals: unlabeled chemical container in warehouse storage area
chemical drum with no identification label or GHS markings
cleaning chemical bottles without hazard information labels

description: Leaking drum — chemical, oil, or waste drum with visible drip, stain, or pooling beneath container
visual_signals: drum with liquid dripping from bung or seam onto floor
dark stain spreading beneath chemical storage drum
corroded drum with pooling liquid visible at base

description: Mezzanine guardrail missing or damaged — mezzanine level lacking standard 42-inch guardrail with midrail and toeboard on open sides
visual_signals: mezzanine edge without guardrail showing open drop-off
damaged or bent mezzanine railing with gap in protection
mezzanine platform with missing midrail or toeboard sections

description: Mezzanine load rating not posted — mezzanine or elevated platform without visible load capacity signage per OSHA 1910.22
visual_signals: mezzanine structure with no load capacity sign visible
elevated storage platform lacking pounds per square foot rating sign
mezzanine stairway entrance without posted weight limit

description: Mezzanine kick plate missing — open-sided mezzanine lacking 4-inch toeboard to prevent objects from falling to lower level
visual_signals: mezzanine edge with guardrail but no toeboard at floor level
gap at base of mezzanine railing where kick plate should be
items near mezzanine edge that could slide under railing without toeboard

description: Mezzanine gate not self-closing — swing gate or pallet gate on mezzanine left open or lacking spring-loaded self-closing mechanism
visual_signals: mezzanine pallet gate standing open with no safety chain
swing gate on mezzanine propped open during operations
drop-gate on mezzanine ledge without self-closing hardware

description: Sprinkler head clearance insufficient — storage or racking top level within 18 inches of sprinkler deflector plate violating NFPA 13
visual_signals: top of stacked inventory nearly touching sprinkler head
rack top shelf merchandise within inches of ceiling sprinkler
in-rack sprinkler head obstructed by product on adjacent shelf

description: Dock plate or dock board deficiency — dock plate missing rated capacity label, not secured in position, or visibly damaged
visual_signals: dock plate with no capacity rating label visible on surface
dock board shifted or unsecured on dock edge during loading
bent or cracked dock plate with visible structural damage

description: Emergency evacuation map not posted — warehouse area lacking posted evacuation route map or assembly point signage per OSHA 1910.38
visual_signals: warehouse wall near exit without evacuation map posted
break area or main aisle lacking emergency route diagram
building section without visible assembly point signage

description: Flammable storage cabinet violation — flammable liquids stored outside yellow flammable storage cabinet or cabinet doors left open
visual_signals: flammable liquid containers sitting outside yellow storage cabinet
flammable cabinet with doors propped or left open
aerosol cans and solvents on open shelf instead of rated cabinet

description: Compressed gas cylinders improperly stored — cylinders not chained upright, caps missing, or incompatible gases stored together
visual_signals: gas cylinder standing without chain or strap securing it to wall
compressed gas bottle with valve protection cap removed during storage
oxygen and acetylene cylinders stored side by side without separation

description: Spill containment missing for hazardous materials — hazmat drums or chemical containers stored without secondary containment pallet or berm
visual_signals: chemical drums sitting directly on floor without spill pallet
hazardous material containers on bare concrete with no containment
multiple liquid drums stored without berm or drip tray beneath

description: Battery charging station lacking ventilation — forklift battery charging area without adequate ventilation for hydrogen gas dissipation
visual_signals: enclosed battery charging room with no visible exhaust fan or vent
forklift charging station in closed area without ventilation opening
battery charging area with sealed ceiling and no air movement

description: Battery charging area missing eyewash — forklift battery charging station without accessible eyewash station within 25 feet per OSHA 1910.151
visual_signals: battery charging area with no eyewash station or bottle visible nearby
charging station wall lacking mounted eyewash unit
battery maintenance area without plumbed or portable eyewash within reach

description: Battery charging area missing no-smoking sign — forklift charging zone without no smoking and open flame prohibition signage
visual_signals: battery charging station without no smoking sign posted
charging area entrance lacking fire and flame prohibition signage
forklift battery bay without warning signs about hydrogen gas

description: Conveyor emergency stop missing or obstructed — conveyor system without accessible red emergency stop button or pull cord along its length
visual_signals: conveyor section with no visible red emergency stop button
e-stop pull cord missing from conveyor side rail
emergency stop button on conveyor blocked by boxes or equipment

description: Conveyor nip point unguarded — exposed pinch points at conveyor rollers, belts, or drive mechanisms without protective guarding
visual_signals: exposed conveyor belt and roller junction without guard
open drive mechanism at conveyor end with rotating parts exposed
conveyor return roller accessible without nip point guard installed

description: Conveyor walkway crossover missing — conveyor line crossing pedestrian path without designated crossover bridge or underpass
visual_signals: conveyor belt crossing aisle with no overhead walkway bridge
workers stepping over running conveyor to cross path
conveyor blocking pedestrian route without safe crossover point

description: Noise hazard area without signage — area with loud equipment lacking hearing protection required signs or noise warning posting
visual_signals: loud machinery area without hearing protection required sign
high-noise zone entrance lacking decibel warning notice
compressor or machinery room without posted noise hazard signage

description: Worker without hearing protection in noise area — employee near loud equipment without earplugs or earmuffs where noise exceeds 85 dBA
visual_signals: worker near loud conveyor or equipment with no ear protection
employee operating noisy machinery without earmuffs or plugs
person in posted hearing protection area with uncovered ears

description: First aid kit missing or inaccessible — warehouse area without accessible first aid kit or supplies in designated location
visual_signals: empty first aid cabinet or bracket on warehouse wall
first aid station sign with no kit present at location
first aid box blocked by stored materials preventing access

description: AED missing from designated location — automated external defibrillator absent from its posted wall cabinet or mounting
visual_signals: empty AED wall cabinet with door open and no unit inside
AED sign posted on wall with no device present
AED mounting bracket on wall without defibrillator unit

description: Electrical panel clearance violation in warehouse — breaker panel or electrical equipment with less than 36-inch clear working space
visual_signals: pallets stored within arm's reach of electrical distribution panel
racking or shelving installed within 36 inches of breaker box
product staged on floor directly in front of electrical panel

description: Ergonomic lifting hazard — worker manually lifting heavy or awkward load without assistance, team lift, or mechanical aid
visual_signals: worker bending at waist to lift heavy box from floor level
single person struggling with oversized or heavy package
employee lifting load above shoulder height without mechanical aid
